name: drift_orphan_detection
description: Detect goal drift (stale objectives, declining progress) and orphan tasks (tasks without parent goals). Produces detection report for governance review.
intent: Identify drift and orphan conditions in the goal hierarchy

inputs.name: scope_id
inputs.description: Odoo record ID for scope entity

inputs.name: staleness_threshold_days
inputs.description: Days without update to flag as stale

outputs.name: drift_items
outputs.description: Goals with detected drift (stale, declining, blocked)

agentInstructions: Scan all goals within scope for staleness (no update within threshold), declining progress trends, and blocked states. Identify tasks not linked to any goal. Report findings without remediation — detection only.
